subject: docs: add backend field type alignment spec
body:
Detailed spec for syncing tool-till-tees backend types with the
frontend. Covers 3 files: forms-types.ts (type definitions),
form-validation.ts (submission validator), form-conditions.ts
(condition evaluator). Frontend is source of truth — checkbox_group
submissions are currently unvalidated, condition models differ.

Tags: documentation, backend, spec, alignment
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: api
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: form-lifecycle
Semver: patch
